creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #20)
beta7 builds fine and seems to run fine.

I'm not sure if the WebRTC work re. sndio mentioned in [1] is supposed to
work already or if this is something for Firefox 59.0, or if it's just unstable
on FreeBSD.  Trying the AudioRecorder demo [2] on beta6 crashed the tab often
but could be made to work sometimes.

[1] http://www.undeadly.org/cgi?action=article;sid=20171113091807
[2] https://webaudiodemos.appspot.com/AudioRecorder/index.html
